name: Shinjuu Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Dr. Eric Silverman's own 11x11 drop-shogi variant, themed on the Four Divine Beasts. 29 pieces a side of 16 exotic types (Blue Dragon, White Tiger, Vermillion Sparrow, Turtle Snake, Kirin, Phoenix, elephants and birds), full modern shogi drops (nifu / uchifuzume), promotion in the far three ranks, win by checkmate.
